mapper.select: select count(1) from mom_mbom where mbom_code = #{mbomCode} and mbom_id != #{mbomId}
select count(1) from mom_mbom where product_id = #{productId} and version = #{version} and mbom_id != #{mbomId}
mapper.insert: insert into mom_mbom(mbom_code, mbom_name, product_id, version, effective_date, expire_date, status, remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{mbomCode}, #{mbomName}, #{productId}, #{version}, #{effectiveDate}, #{expireDate}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: delete from mom_mbom where mbom_id in #{mbomId}
mapper.sql: select i.item_id, i.mbom_id, i.parent_item_id, i.material_id, m.material_code, m.material_name, m.spec_model, m.unit, i.item_seq, i.quantity, i.scrap_rate, i.operation_id, o.operation_code, i.step_id, s.step_code, i.issue_type, i.status, i.create_by, i.create_time, i.update_by, i.update_time, i.remark from mom_mbom_item i left join mom_material m on i.material_id = m.material_id left join mom_operation o on i.operation_id = o.operation_id left join mom_work_step s on i.step_id = s.step_id
mapper.select: select count(1) from mom_mbom_item where mbom_id = #{mbomId} and parent_item_id = #{parentItemId} and item_seq = #{itemSeq} and item_id != #{itemId}
mapper.insert: insert into mom_mbom_item(mbom_id, parent_item_id, material_id, item_seq, quantity, scrap_rate, operation_id, step_id, issue_type, status, remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{mbomId}, #{parentItemId}, #{materialId}, #{itemSeq}, #{quantity}, #{scrapRate}, #{operationId}, #{stepId}, #{issueType}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: delete from mom_mbom_item where item_id in #{itemId}
delete from mom_mbom_item where mbom_id in #{mbomId}
